query:
ALTER TABLE kb_listing_copywriting
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private';

ALTER TABLE kb_image_sets
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private';

ALTER TABLE kb_operation_skills
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private',
  ADD COLUMN accessLevel ENUM('public','team','restricted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'public',
  ADD COLUMN allowedRoles TEXT NULL;

ALTER TABLE kb_videos
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private';
